'''âr-n-f''' ('''ranafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brassen|brassen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brassen|brassen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-f
|-
! Lemma
| ranafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranafithi|ranafithi]] || [[word:ranafiji|ranafiji]] || [[word:ranafishi|ranafishi]] || [[word:ranafi|ranafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranafuthuth|ranafuthuth]] || [[word:ranafujuj|ranafujuj]] || [[word:ranafushush|ranafushush]] || [[word:ranaf|ranaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranafuthu|ranafuthu]] || [[word:ranafuju|ranafuju]] || [[word:ranafushu|ranafushu]] || [[word:ranafu|ranafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranafufuth|ranafufuth]] || [[word:ranafufuj|ranafufuj]] || [[word:ranafufush|ranafufush]] || [[word:ranafuf|ranafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranafethe|ranafethe]] || [[word:ranafeje|ranafeje]] || [[word:ranafeshe|ranafeshe]] || [[word:ranafe|ranafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranafothoth|ranafothoth]] || [[word:ranafojoj|ranafojoj]] || [[word:ranafoshosh|ranafoshosh]] || [[word:ranaf|ranaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranafotho|ranafotho]] || [[word:ranafojo|ranafojo]] || [[word:ranafosho|ranafosho]] || [[word:ranafo|ranafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranafofoth|ranafofoth]] || [[word:ranafofoj|ranafofoj]] || [[word:ranafofosh|ranafofosh]] || [[word:ranafof|ranafof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranafĂŻfĂŻf|ranafĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻfĂŻf|ranafĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻfĂŻf|ranafĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻfĂŻf|ranafĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]] || [[word:ranafĂŻf|ranafĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranafĂŠthĂŠ|ranafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ranafĂŠjĂŠ|ranafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ranafĂŠshĂŠ|ranafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ranafĂŠ|ranafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranafathath|ranafathath]] || [[word:ranafajaj|ranafajaj]] || [[word:ranafashash|ranafashash]] || [[word:ranaf|ranaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranafatha|ranafatha]] || [[word:ranafaja|ranafaja]] || [[word:ranafasha|ranafasha]] || [[word:ranafa|ranafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranafafath|ranafafath]] || [[word:ranafafaj|ranafafaj]] || [[word:ranafafash|ranafafash]] || [[word:ranafaf|ranafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ranafasha|ranafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goranafasha|goranafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiranafasha|gokiranafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ranafnĂŒsha|ranafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goranafnknĂŒsha|goranafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiranafnĂŒsha|gokiranafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ranafshĂ«sha|ranafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goranafnkshĂ«sha|goranafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiranafshĂ«sha|gokiranafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranafrosha|ranafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranafnkrosha|goranafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranafrosha|gokiranafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ranafmusha|ranafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goranafnkmusha|goranafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranafmusha|gokiranafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ranafsherasha|ranafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goranafnksherasha|goranafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiranafsherasha|gokiranafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ranafngasha|ranafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goranafnkngasha|goranafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiranafngasha|gokiranafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ranafyasha|ranafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goranafnkyasha|goranafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiranafyasha|gokiranafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ranafyamasha|ranafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goranafnkyamasha|goranafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiranafyamasha|gokiranafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranafnĂŒshĂ«sha|ranafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goranafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiranafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranafnĂŒrosha|ranafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranafnknĂŒrosha|goranafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranafnĂŒrosha|gokiranafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranafnĂŒmusha|ranafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranafnknĂŒmusha|goranafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranafnĂŒmusha|gokiranafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranafshĂ«nĂŒsha|ranafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goranafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiranafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranafshĂ«rosha|ranafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranafnkshĂ«rosha|goranafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranafshĂ«rosha|gokiranafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranafshĂ«musha|ranafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranafnkshĂ«musha|goranafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranafshĂ«musha|gokiranafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranafronĂŒsha|ranafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranafnkronĂŒsha|goranafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranafronĂŒsha|gokiranafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranafroshĂ«sha|ranafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranafnkroshĂ«sha|goranafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranafroshĂ«sha|gokiranafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranafromusha|ranafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranafnkromusha|goranafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranafromusha|gokiranafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranafmunĂŒsha|ranafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranafnkmunĂŒsha|goranafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranafmunĂŒsha|gokiranafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranafmushĂ«sha|ranafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranafnkmushĂ«sha|goranafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranafmushĂ«sha|gokiranafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranafmurosha|ranafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranafnkmurosha|goranafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranafmurosha|gokiranafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ranaf|ranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠf|rĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horanaf|horanaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠnĂŠf|horĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoranaf|hohoranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠnĂŠf|hohorĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒranaf|nĂŒranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠnĂŠf|nĂŒrĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒranaf|nĂŒnĂŒranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠnĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻranaf|nĂŻranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠnĂŠf|nĂŻrĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻranaf|nĂŻnĂŻranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠnĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luranaf|luranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠnĂŠf|lurĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluranaf|luluranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠnĂŠf|lulurĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liranaf|liranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠnĂŠf|lirĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliranaf|liliranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠnĂŠf|lilirĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koranaf|koranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠnĂŠf|korĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoranaf|kokoranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠnĂŠf|kokorĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keranaf|keranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠnĂŠf|kerĂŠnĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeranaf|kekeranaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠnĂŠf|kekerĂŠnĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
